name: ClickUp
description: Monitor ClickUp workspace members and space organization for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to ClickUp as a Workspace Admin or Owner
2. Click your avatar (top-right) > Settings > Apps
3. Under API Token, click Generate and copy the token (starts with pk_)
4. For the Team/Workspace ID, go to Settings > Workspace Settings — the ID is in the URL

Note: Use an admin account's personal token. It gives workspace-wide access to members and spaces. Personal tokens never expire.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews ClickUp workspace members and their roles

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies ClickUp spaces are organized for environment separation
